content:
Day 1 of Learning Python 🐍
Today was my first Python class through CodeBattle, and honestly, I didn't know what to expect.
The class was mostly an introduction. Our instructors introduced themselves and shared how they started learning programming. It was nice to hear that they were beginners once too. It made everything feel a little less scary.
One thing they kept saying was that if we stay consistent and practice regularly, we'll be able to learn Python. That really gave me confidence because I'm starting from zero.
We didn't write any code today, but I still feel like I learned something important: every journey has a first day.
I'm excited (and a little nervous 😅) for the upcoming classes. Let's see where this journey takes me.
See you after Day 2. 🚀
